title: Refactor the full Auth module: authenticate + refresh + sign_out
prompt:
Given the complete MyApp.Auth module from test_fixtures/nested_case_auth.ex plus this additional function:

```
def sign_out(token_string) do
  case Token.decode(token_string) do
    {:ok, claims} ->
      case Session.destroy(claims["session_id"]) do
        :ok -> :ok
        err -> err
      end
    err -> err
  end
end
```

Refactor the entire module — authenticate/2, refresh/1, sign_out/1 — so each uses a `with` expression. Apply a consistent philosophy: extract helper `lookup_user/1` that returns `{:ok, user}` / `{:error, :user_deleted}`. Extract `check_password/2` that returns `:ok` / `{:error, :invalid_credentials}`. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.Auth do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Module-wide consistent refactor with shared helpers. Synthesis of philosophy + with + heads.
